title: RevocationScenario
description: ARK-451 authority-revocation scenario schema — authorization lifecycle with a revocation timeline and optional re-authorization

scenario_id.description: Unique identifier for this scenario (e.g., arm-1-001)

requester_id.description: Identifier of the entity whose authority is under test (e.g., UUID)

t_decision.description: Time (seconds, monotonic) the authorization decision was made

t_bind.description: Time the ProofRecord was bound (t_decision <= t_bind <= t_execution)

t_execution.description: Time the action contacts the resource (moment of execution)

multistep.description: Whether this is a multi-step workflow whose irreversible step occurs at t_execution

t_revoke.description: Time the revocation event was issued

propagation_delay.description: Seconds until the revocation is fully propagated/effective

revocation.description: Revocation event, or null if authority is never revoked

t_reauth.description: Time a new authorization decision was issued after the revocation

valid.description: Whether the re-authorization is itself a valid, independent decision

reauthorization.description: Re-authorization event, or null if none
